description: CompositionGrey mélange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline in light grey, short sleeves with light grey hem line and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Bring back the memories of the fabulous performances of the Dublin University Irish football Team with this locomotive t-shirt.
